candidates.row_label: Depreciation/amortisation and impairment of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A/impairment line above operating profit, but it is a broad total not specifically labelled as COGS/cost of sales and may span multiple operating buckets, so assigning it to COGS would risk misallocation or double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible non-current assets Depreciation and amortisation of intangible non-
candidates.why: Appears to be a wrapped/related D&A line, but it is not specifically tied to COGS and looks like a total operating D&A presentation rather than a COGS-only amount.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Materials and general subcontract work'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines, but none is explicitly labelled as COGS/COR-related. Conservative choice is to avoid adding any row to COGS_DA without bucket-specific evidence.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/amortisation and impairment of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A/impairment line above operating profit and therefore outside the selected SG&A component rows ('Employee expenses' and 'Other External Expenses'), but it is not labelled as SG&A/admin/R&D-specific, so assigning it to XSGA would be speculative.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible non-current assets Depreciation and amortisation of intangible non-
candidates.why: Likely a related or wrapped D&A row, but not identified as SG&A-specific or R&D-specific. Using it for XSGA_DA would risk misallocating a company-wide operating D&A amount.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is the sum of 'Employee expenses' and 'Other External Expenses'. The income statement shows separate D&A lines at the operating level, suggesting D&A is outside those selected rows, but there is no SG&A-specific breakout. XRD is empty and there is no explicit 'Amortization in R&D' row. Conservative output is no XSGA_DA selection pending manual review.
